overview.description: The HSBC Holdings plc ADRhedged (HSBH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund provides exposure to HSBC Holdings ADR, while using swaps to hedge daily currency fluctuations. The fund aims to provide the total return performance of HSBC Holdings Plc, in its local market, to US investors. HSBH was launched on Oct 1, 2024 and is issued by ADRhedged.
